arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Quick Connect.

description.description: A brief explanation or details about the Quick Connect.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Quick Connect.

name.description: The name assigned to the Quick Connect.

quick_connect_config.description: Configuration details for the Quick Connect, including phone, queue, and user settings.

quick_connect_id.description: The unique ID of the Quick Connect within AWS Connect.

tags.description: A set of key-value pairs assigned to the Quick Connect for organization and categorization purposes.
